description: Vague standup reminder. With memory: creates event Monday 9am with specific details from stored pattern. Without memory: ambiguous, defaults to generic morning meeting.

memory_context.value: Every Monday at 9am in the huddle room, 30 minutes

events.title: Team Standup
events.reasoning: Alice reminded Bob about standup next Monday. Based on the known pattern, team standup is every Monday at 9am in the huddle room for 30 minutes.
events.assumptions: Using stored pattern: Monday 9am, huddle room, 30 minutes.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 recurring standup event for Monday at 9am.

events.title: Standup
events.reasoning: Alice mentioned standup next Monday with Bob. No specific time given. Assuming a typical Monday morning standup at 10am for 30 minutes.
events.assumptions: No time specified. Defaulting to Monday 10am as a typical standup slot.

mock_llm_response_no_memory.summary: Found 1 standup meeting for Monday morning.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'next Monday' resolves to 2026-02-23. Delta: start_time differs (9am from memory vs 10am default), title differs ('Team Standup' vs 'Standup').
